---
title: "Research"
image: "img/kp_2.JPG"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---

```{r, printing-fuctions, echo=F}
wrap_li <- function(text = "text", fa = "fas fa-graduation-cap") {
  li <- paste0("<li><i class='fa-li ", fa, "'></i>", text, "</li>\n")
  return(li)
}
print_list <- function(text = "text", fa = "fas fa-graduation-cap") {
  open_ul  <- "<ul class='ul-edu fa-ul'>"
  close_ul <- "</ul>"
  items    <- wrap_li(text, fa)
  cat(paste0(open_ul, "\n"), items, paste0("\n", close_ul))
}
```

### Submitted 

**Parrish, K.** (second round of review) The Double Phonemic Boundary Effect in L3 acquisition: the perception of 'French' and 'Hungarian' stops by Spanish-English bilinguals.

### Publications

Casillas, J. V., Constantin-Dureci, G., Andreu Rascón, I., Shao, J., Rodríguez, S. A., Gadamsetty, A., ...**Parrish, K**. & Esposito, R. (2025). Opening open science to all: demystifying reproducibility and transparency practices in linguistic research. *Linguistics*, 63(6), 1547-1575.

**Parrish, K. (2024)**. Statistical Insignificance is not wholesale transfer in L3 Acquisition: An approximate replication of Rothman (2011). *Studies in Second Language Acquisition*, 46(5), 1439-1456.

**Parrish, K** (2023). A Simulated Analysis of Repeated Measures in VOT: We need more tokens! *ICPhS 2023*. [link](https://guarant.cz/icphs2023/900.pdf)

Casillas, J. V., Garrido-Pozú, J. J., **Parrish, K**., Arroyo, L. F., Rodríguez, N., Esposito, R., ... & Taveras, K. (2023). Using intonation to disambiguate meaning: The role of empathy and proficiency in L2 perceptual development. *Applied Psycholinguistics*. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1017/S0142716423000310)

**Parrish, K.** (2022). The Categorization of L3 vowels at first exposure by Spanish-English bilinguals. *Languages*. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/languages7030226)

**Parrish, K.** (2022). The Production of L3 French stop-initial words by Spanish/English bilinguals. *The International Journal of Multilingualism*. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/14790718.2022.2060234)


### Conference Presentations and Posters

Gomes, J., Martinez Bruera, M., **Parrish, K.**, Oltrogge, E. (2026), The effect of coarticulation on L2 spoken word recognition. 39th Annual Conference on Human Sentence Processing. Cambridge, MA. 

**Parrish K.**, Darvishi Rokni, N. Goncalves Miranda, L, Selma Inam, S & Zschernack, P. (2025) A systematic review and analysis of repeated measures designs in Language Learning. The First Workshop on Replication in the Language Sciences (WoReLa1). Goethe Universität Frankfurt. Frankfurt am Main, Germany.

**Parrish, K.**, (2025) Multilevel models can induce biased individual estimates: a simulation of L3 VOT production. The 15th International Symposium on Bilingualism. Basque Center for Language and Cognition, San Sebastian, Spain.

**Parrish, K.** (2024) The Cognate Facilitation Effect in L3 lexical processing. EUROSLA 33: The 33rd Conference of the European Second Language Association. Montpellier, France.

**Parrish, K.** (2023) A conceptual replication of Rothman (2011): L3 Syntactic Transfer Selectivity and Typological Determinacy. The 14th International Symposium on Bilingualism. Macquarie University, Sydney, Australia.

**Parrish, K.** (2023) A Simulated Analysis of repeated measures in VOT: We need more tokens! 20th International Congress of Phonetic Sciences (ICPhS). Prague Conference Center, Prague, Czech Republic.

**Parrish, K.** (2023) Multilevel models can induce biased individual estimates: a simulation of L3 VOT production. The 15th International Symposium on Bilingualism. Basque Center for Language and Cognition, San Sebastian, Spain.

**Parrish, K.** How low sample sizes can lead to erroneous conclusions: A practical introduction to power analysis in R. Hispanic Linguistics Symposium. Arizona State University, Tempe, Arizona.

**Parrish, K,**. (2022). The Categorization of L3 French sounds at first exposure by Spanish-English bilinguals. The 10th International Symposium on the Acquisition of Second Language Speech. University of Barcelona. 

Rodríguez, N., **Parrish, K.**, and Garrido Pozu, J. (2022). The Effect of Lexical Frequency on Word Duration: analyzing corpus data in Spanish and English. The 10th International Symposium on the Acquisition of Second Language Speech. University of Barcelona. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/frequency_duration_spmonolinguals/slides/new_sounds.html#1)

**Parrish, K.** (2022). L3 French Voice-Onset Time at first exposure by Spanish-English bilinguals. Current Approaches to Spanish and Portuguese Second Language Phonology. The University of Wisconsin at Madison. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/l3_production_study/slides/casp.html#1)

Casillas, J. V., Garrido Pozu, J., Rodríguez, N., **Parrish, K.**, Fernandez Arroyo, L., Esposito, R., Chang, I., and Gómez, K., Constantin-Dureci, G., Shao, J., Andreu, I.,  Taveras, K. (2022). Inferring meaning from intonation: The effects of proficiency and empathy on L2 pragmatic skills. The University of Wisconsin at Madison. [Slides](https://www.rap-group.jvcasillas.com/empathy_intonation_perc/docs/slides/caspslap_2022/#1)

**Parrish, K.** (2021). The relative VOT productions of L3 french by Spanish-English bilin- guals at first exposure. Multiple language acquisition, processing, and development. EpiCAMP, Europe. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/l3_production_study/slides/epicamp#1)

Casillas, J. V., Pozu, J. J. G., Rodríguez, N., **Parrish, K.**, Arroyo, L. F., Esposito, R., Chang, I., and Gómez, K. (2021). Using intonation to disambiguate meaning: The role of empathy and proficiency in L2 perceptual development. Hispanic Linguistics Symposium. Wake Forest University, Winston-Salem, NC.
[Slides](https://www.rap-group.jvcasillas.com/empathy_intonation_perc/docs/slides/hls_2021/index.html#1)

### Invited Talks

**Parrish, K**. (2022). Evidence of a frequency effect in Spanish L1 word duration. Brown bag Lunch. The Department of Spanish and Portuguese, Rutgers University. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/frequency_duration_spmonolinguals/slides/index.html#1)

**Parrish, K**. (2021). An introduction to L3 Acquisition. Invited Speaker in the Undregraduate course: Two Languages, One Mind. Rutgers. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/l3_production_study/talk_slides.html#1)

**Parrish, K**. (2021). L3 French Voice-Onset Time at first exposure by Spanish-English bilinguals. Phon and Phon Invited Talk. Adam Mickiewicz University, Poznan, Poland. [Slides](https://kparrish92.github.io/l3_production_study/slides/index.html#1)

\endgroup
